signals.raw:
BTC ETFs 5-Day Inflow Streak Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**  
U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded $238.37 million in net inflows on April 20, extending a 5 consecutive-day streak—the firmest institutional buying since February—led by BlackRock’s IBIT at $256.05 million.[1][3]
